overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, digital billboards, and a waterfront canal. The footage showcases the game's atmospheric lighting and detailed urban environment with passing vehicles and distinctive architectural elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban street with traffic control gantry

events.description: passing under the red LED NO ENTRY gantry spanning the road
black sedan drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: elevated structure with red LED NO ENTRY signs spanning across the road
tall futuristic skyscraper with distinctive orange and white geometric facade patterns
overhead highway structure with concrete support columns
modern glass curtain wall building with illuminated interior windows

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic city street at night, passing under a NO ENTRY gantry with red LED signs. The distinctive geometric tower rises in the distance while vehicles pass by on the right. The elevated highway structure runs parallel on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront canal with industrial district view

events.description: camera turns left to reveal the waterfront canal and industrial tower district
view shifts to darker waterfront area with water reflections and reduced ambient light

agents.ego_description: standing on the sidewalk looking out over the water toward the industrial tower marked 03

entered.detail: tall cylindrical industrial tower with large illuminated 03 signage and red accents
dark waterway reflecting city lights with gentle ripples
small orange vessel moored near the industrial tower base

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to face the waterfront, revealing a dark canal with the prominent industrial tower 03 standing across the water. The elevated highway structure now frames the top of the view while the water reflects the sparse city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with digital advertising

events.description: camera turns back to face the street and resumes walking forward
passing large curved digital billboard displaying colorful neon patterns

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past vibrant neon advertisements and storefronts

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving away down the street

entered.detail: building facade covered in large curved digital screens displaying colorful abstract neon patterns
overhead sign structure with directions to Night City and Westbrook

segments.scene_description: Returning to the street view, the camera walks past a building covered in massive curved LED screens displaying vibrant neon patterns. The geometric tower looms closer ahead while approaching an overhead directional sign gantry.

events.description: passing under the directional sign gantry with Night City and Westbrook signs
turning right toward the waterfront promenade with distant city skyline

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, passing under the gantry, then turning toward the waterfront area

notable_agents.action: white luxury sedan parked near the intersection corner

entered.detail: lower level walkway along the water with view of distant illuminated city skyline
large concrete pillar supporting the overhead directional gantry

segments.scene_description: Walking under the directional gantry with signs pointing to Night City and Westbrook, the camera passes a parked white luxury sedan before turning right toward the waterfront promenade. The view opens to the water with the distant city skyline visible across the dark canal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk district that shifts from a dense urban corridor to an open waterfront promenade. It begins by moving along a futuristic street under a red LED no-entry gantry, with an elevated highway on the left and a geometric tower rising in the distance. As the camera turns toward the water, the view opens to a dark canal reflecting sparse city lights with industrial tower 03 standing prominently across the surface. The scene then shifts back to the street to pass massive curved LED screens displaying vibrant neon patterns before gliding under a directional gantry pointing toward Night City and Westbrook. Finally, the camera passes a parked white luxury sedan and turns right, expanding the view across the waterfront promenade toward the distant city skyline.
